Description: Portfolio professionnel de Gurkan Taner, Software Engineer Freelance basé à Strasbourg. Expertise en développement fullstack, architecture logicielle et infrastructure DevOps.

# SITE OWNER & E-E-A-T INFORMATION

Author: Gurkan Taner
Professional-Title: Software Engineer Freelance

Geographic-Focus: Strasbourg, France
Service-Model: Freelance Consulting & Development

# ============================================================================
# TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS
# ============================================================================

Framework: Next.js 16.2.1
Language: TypeScript
CSS-Framework: Tailwind CSS
Database: PostgreSQL
Hosting: Docker Container (Standalone output)
Deployment: Production-Ready

Technology-Stack:
  Frontend:
    - Next.js 16.2.1
    - React 18
    - TypeScript
    - Tailwind CSS
    - Framer Motion
    - Lucide Icons
    - Vue 3
    
  Backend:
    - Node.js
    - Express / Next.js API Routes
    - SpringBoot
    
  DevOps:
    - Docker
    - CI/CD (implied)
